zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amabilia de Venables於大約1147年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓時，她的父親Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton32歲，母親Baroness Margery de Hatton11145歲。她於1176年之前與Richard de Davenport結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1200年在英國爾米德列維其享年54歲。

zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amabilia de Venables于大约1147年出生在英国英格兰爾金德頓时，她的父亲Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton32岁，母亲Baroness Margery de Hatton11145岁。她于1176年之前与Richard de Davenport结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1200年在英国爾米德列維其享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

en.lifeSummary: When Amabilia de Venables was born about 1147, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, was 32 and her mother, Baroness Margery de Hatton, was 11145. She married Richard de Davenport before 1176. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1200, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amabilia de Venables est née environ 1147, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery de Hatton, avait 11145 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Davenport avant 1176. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amabilia de Venables um 1147 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton 32 und ihre Mutter Baroness Margery de Hatton 11145. Sie hat vor 1176 Richard de Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1200 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Middlewich, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amabilia de Venables è nata il circa 1147 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Baroness Margery de Hatton, aveva 11145 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Davenport prima del 1176. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1200, nel Middlewich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amabilia de Venablesが約1147年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kindertonは32歳，母Baroness Margery de Hattonは11145歳であった。1176年以前にRichard de Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1200年にイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amabilia de Venables(이)가 대략 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Margery de Hatton(은)는 11145세였다. 그녀는 1176년 이전 Richard de Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northwich, Cheshire, England: Northwich, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amabilia de Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1147, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery de Hatton, tinha 11145 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Davenport antes 1176. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amabilia de Venables родилась около 1147 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery de Hatton, 11145. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Davenport перед 1176 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amabilia de Venables nació aproximadamente 1147, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery de Hatton, tenía 11145 años. Se casó con Richard de Davenport antes de 1176. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1200, en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
